messages.content: 翻译Absent immediate surgical countermeasures, the death toll from a ruptured AAA, marked by a localized enlargement of the abdominal aortic vessel wall, soars above 80%, rendering it one of the most formidable cardiovascular maladies
如果不立即采取外科手术措施，腹主动脉瘤破裂（AAA）的死亡率会飙升至80%以上，使其成为最令人畏惧的心血管疾病之一。腹主动脉瘤破裂的特点是腹主动脉血管壁出现局部扩张。
改为中文论文语言，如果不立即采取外科手术措施，腹主动脉瘤破裂（AAA）的死亡率会飙升至80%以上，使其成为最令人畏惧的心血管疾病之一。腹主动脉瘤破裂的特点是腹主动脉血管壁出现局部扩张。
若不迅速实施外科干预手术，腹主动脉瘤（AAA）破裂后的病死率将急剧上升至超过80%，由此成为最具威胁性的心血管疾患之一。腹主动脉瘤的临床表现为腹部主动脉壁局部的异常扩大。

翻译为中文论文的语言A ruptured AAA is a leading cause of death, and until it ruptures, it may be asymptomatic. There is a trend of annual decline in mortality rates (P<0. 002). 32% of patients with AAA who died due to rupture perished in the community because they did not seek medical attention in a timely manner, and 40% died in the hospital because they did not receive appropriate intervention
主动脉瘤破裂是导致死亡的主要原因之一，而瘤体破裂前可能无任何症状。研究显示，与该病相关的死亡率每年呈现下降趋势（P<0.002）。统计数据表明，因腹主动脉瘤破裂而死亡的患者中，有32%的人是因为未能及时就医而在社区丧生，还有40%的人虽然到达了医院，但由于没有获得适当的干预措施而死亡。
翻译为中文论文的语言AAA's inception and progression are an intricate pathophysiological orchestration of several molecular and cellular interaction matrices
腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的形成与发展是多种分子与细胞相互作用矩阵复杂的病理生理过程的体现。

翻译为中文论文语言Consequently, the identification of novel molecular targets that contribute to the onset and progression of AAA is of immense clinical value. Currently, bioinformatics analysis has surfaced as a crucial technique for scientific research in the medical field
因此，识别促成腹主动脉瘤（AAA）发病与进展的新型分子靶点具有极高的临床价值。目前，生物信息学分析已成为医学领域科学研究的重要技术手段。

翻译为中文论文语言 The ever-growing availability of public datasets is altering the traditional methods of clinical physicians and researchers. The consolidation as well as evaluation of datasets mitigate inaccuracies in modest-scale experimental investigations, consequently fortifying the reliability of the study's outcomes. Analogous bioinformatics scrutiny has propelled our preliminary comprehension of disease pathogenesis, offering credible concepts and pathways for future clinical investigative pursuits. The microarray platform, offering high-throughput capacities, has become a powerful and effective way to discover changes in genetics or epigenetics that are significant in disease conditions. It is a valuable resource for identifying potential biomarkers used in disease diagnosis and prediction
随着公共数据集的日益丰富，传统的临床医师和研究者的研究方法正在发生变革。数据集的整合及评估能够减少小规模实验研究中的不准确性，从而增强研究结果的可靠性。类似的生物信息学分析已推动我们对疾病发病机制的初步理解，为未来的临床研究提供了可信的概念和途径。微阵列平台以其高通量分析能力，已成为发现疾病状态下遗传学或表观遗传学重要变化的有力而有效的方法，它是识别用于病症诊断和预测的潜在生物标记物的宝贵资源。
翻译为中文论文语言The pathological mechanism of AAA is complex, which involves a large amount of inflammation reactions in the aortic tissue and extracellular matrix degeneration
腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的病理机制复杂，涉及到主动脉组织大量的炎症反应以及细胞外基质的退化。

翻译为中文论文语言The significance of inflammation in AAA pathogenesis has been confirmed, and it should be noted that oxidative stress, which increases in inflammation, also plays a crucial role in the pathophysiology of inflammation
炎症在腹主动脉瘤（AAA）发病机制中的重要性已被证实，并且值得注意的是，在炎症中增加的氧化应激同样在炎症的病理生理过程中扮演着至关重要的角色。

翻译为中文论文语言Moreover, endothelial cells, smooth muscle cells, and fibroblasts also yield proteinases that degrade the inner elastic layer, thereby augmenting AAA progression[7]. Adventitial mesenchymal cells, inclusive of fibroblasts, myofibroblasts, and "synthetic" vascular smooth muscle cells, discharge type I collagen, Transforming Growth Factor (TGF)-b, and Matrix Metalloproteinases that govern extracellular matrix remodeling
此外，内皮细胞、平滑肌细胞和成纤维细胞也会产生蛋白酶，这些蛋白酶分解内弹性层，进而加剧腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的进展[7]。包括成纤维细胞、肌成纤维细胞和“合成型”血管平滑肌细胞在内的外膜间充质细胞会释放I型胶原、转化生长因子（TGF）-β和基质金属蛋白酶，这些物质控制细胞外基质的重塑。

翻译为中文论文语言Due to unclear pathogenesis, except for surgical intervention, there is currently no specific and effective drug therapy to prevent the progression and rupture of AAA in clinical practice. Hence, the identification of novel molecular targets tied to AAA's onset and evolution bears considerable clinical significance. Recently, bioinformatics has presented a novel method for apprehending disease pathogenesis, with the Gene Expression Omnibus datasets emerging as the most comprehensive public repository for gene expression data
由于病因不明确，除了外科干预手术外，目前临床实践中还没有特定有效的药物治疗方法来预防腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的发展和破裂。因此，识别与AAA发病和进展相关的新型分子靶点具有重大的临床意义。近年来，生物信息学提出了一种新的方法来理解疾病的发病机理，其中基因表达综合数据库（Gene Expression Omnibus，GEO）成为了最全面的公开基因表达数据资源库。

翻译为中文论文语言The biological functions and corresponding pathways of the identified DEGs were explicated, and Receiver Operating Characteristic diagnostic curves for principal genes were assembled. By employing bioinformatics to decipher the crucial molecules and pathways implicated in AAA pathogenesis, we have elucidated the pathological mechanism of AAA and recognized relevant molecules in clinical practice.
已鉴定的差异表达基因（DEGs）的生物学功能和相应的生物途径已得到阐释，并且为主要基因构建了接收者操作特征（ROC）诊断曲线。通过运用生物信息学技术解读腹主动脉瘤（AAA）发病机制中的关键分子和途径，我们阐明了AAA的病理机制，并在临床实践中识别了相关分子。
Information Compilation as well as Assessment of genes with differential expression
差异表达基因的信息汇编与评估

翻译为中文论文语言Using "abdominal aortic aneurysm" as the search term, the GEO datasets (http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/) was probed for data chips corresponding to AAA. Data chips GSE47472, GSE57691, as well as GSE119717 pertinent to AAA were extracted from the datasets utilizing the shared processing platform of GPL10558 (Illumina HumanHT-12 V4.0 expression beadchip). The same team sequentially uploaded GSE47472, GSE57691, and GSE119717, which were detected by the same platform. (Table1).

以“腹主动脉瘤”为搜索词，在基因表达综合数据库(Gene Expression Omnibus, GEO；网址：http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/geo/)中检索与AAA相关的数据芯片。通过共享处理平台GPL10558（Illumina HumanHT-12 V4.0表达芯片）提取与AAA相关的数据芯片GSE47472、GSE57691和GSE119717。这些数据芯片均由同一团队依次上传，并通过相同的平台检测。（表1）。

翻译为中文论文语言This guarantees the consistency not just of the source samples, but also of the sequencing process. In our investigation of gene expression discrepancies, we analyzed specimens from the necks of AAA patients (n=14, with an average max. aortic diameter of 62.6 ± 18.0 millimeter).
这不仅确保了源样本的一致性，而且还确保了测序过程的一致性。在我们对基因表达差异的调查中，我们分析了腹主动脉瘤患者颈部的样本（共14个，平均最大主动脉直径为62.6 ± 18.0毫米）。

翻译为中文论文语言These were compared to control aortic donor specimens (n=8) within the GSE47472 dataset. Each sample was derived from the full-thickness aortic wall, which mitigated the impact of varying sample locations on the final analytical results. Further analysis was conducted on the differential gene expression among 20 patients with small AAA (average max. aortic diameter of 54.3 ± 2.3 millimeter), 29 patients with large AAA (average max. aortic diameter of 68.4 ± 14.3 millimeter), and 10 control aortic specimens from organ donors within the GSE57691 dataset. Likewise, we probed differential gene expression in 30 samples of proliferated peri-vascular adipose tissue vis-a-vis 30 samples of non-proliferated peri-vascular adipose tissue in the GSE119717 dataset.

这些样本与GSE47472数据集中的对照主动脉供体标本（共8个）进行了比较。每个样本均来自完整厚度的主动脉壁，这减少了样本位置差异对最终分析结果的影响。进一步分析了GSE57691数据集中20例小型腹主动脉瘤患者（平均最大主动脉直径54.3 ± 2.3毫米）、29例大型腹主动脉瘤患者（平均最大主动脉直径68.4 ± 14.3毫米）和10个器官捐赠者的对照主动脉标本之间的差异基因表达。同样地，我们在GSE119717数据集中探究了30个血管周围增生脂肪组织样本与30个非增生血管周围脂肪组织样本中的差异基因表达。

翻译为中文论文语言The "sva" R package was deployed for the amalgamation and normalization of the GSE47472 as well as GSE57691 datasets. via the "limma" package in R (edition 4.2.1), we distinguished differentially expressed genes, considering p <0.05 and |log2Foldchange (logFC)| >1 as statistically consequential. For validation purposes, values of p < 0.05 and |log2Fold change (logFC)| > 0.8 were deemed to be important.
我们使用R语言中的"sva" 包来合并并标准化GSE47472和GSE57691数据集。通过R中的"limma"包（版本4.2.1），我们识别出差异表达基因，将p值小于0.05且|log2倍数变化（logFC）|大于1视为统计学上具有意义。出于验证目的，将p值小于0.05且|log2倍数变化（logFC）|大于0.8的情况视为重要。
Assessment on the Functional and Pathway Augmentation of Differentially Expressed Genes
对差异表达基因的功能及途径富集评估
翻译为中文论文语言Assessment on the Functional and Pathway Augmentation of Differentially Expressed Genes
差异表达基因功能与信号通路富集评估

翻译为中文论文语言By employing Gene Ontology, we delved into the biological tasks of the differentially expressed genes, enabling the discernment of related primary cell constituents, molecular functions, and biological processes for our gene of interest. Further, we evaluated the Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes pathways to gain understanding of the signalling routes associated with the gene of interest. This analysis was conducted via the "clusterProfiler [4. 4. 4]" programs within R4. 2.1 software[12]. This is a common approach for annotating genes and investigating their biological properties. We demonstrated that biological process and pathway terms were statistically significant for DEGs.  In light of the observed differences, P<0.05 was determined to be statistically significant relying on the cumulative hypergeometric distribution test. In addition, we present Gene Set Enrichment Analysis, an efficient analytical approach that facilitates the interpretation of gene expression data. Rather than single-gene scrutiny, GSEA prioritizes gene sets, essentially clusters of genes with shared biological function, regulation, or chromosomal location, leveraging the cumulative strength of these sets[13]. This assessment was conducted via the clusterProfiler R package (edition 4.4.4) in R (edition 4.2.1). A p. adj less than 0.05 and FDR (q-value) less than 0.25 were considered as significant differences based on statistical analysis.

通过应用基因本体论(Gene Ontology, GO)，我们深入研究了差异表达基因的生物学功能，从而确定了相关主要细胞组分、分子功能和生物过程。此外，我们评估了京都基因与基因组百科全书（Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes, KEGG）途径，以了解与感兴趣基因相关的信号传导途径。这一分析是通过R4.2.1软件中的"clusterProfiler [4.4.4]"程序进行的[12]。这是一种常见的基因注释和研究其生物学属性的方法。我们证明了生物过程和途径术语对于差异表达基因(DEGs)是统计学上显著的。考虑到观察到的差异，我们确定P<0.05是根据累积超几何分布检验在统计学上具有显著性的。此外，我们提出了基因集富集分析(Gene Set Enrichment Analysis, GSEA)，这是一种有效的分析方法，便于解释基因表达数据。与单基因审查不同，GSEA优先考虑基因集，即共享生物学功能、调控或染色体位置的基因群，并利用这些集合的累积强度[13]。这一评估是通过R（版本4.2.1）中的clusterProfiler R包（版本4.4.4）进行的。基于统计分析，p.adj小于0.05和FDR（q值）小于0.25被认为是显著差异。
翻译为中文论文语言Detecting Central Genes in Functional Modules and Investigating Key Genes
检测功能模块中的核心基因并研究关键基因

翻译为中文论文语言To construct the protein-protein interaction network, we utilized Cytoscape software (http://cytoscape.org/). Within this network, each protein is symbolized by a node, with its interactions with other proteins represented by an edge. We utilized the STRING datasets (protein-protein interaction network functional enrichment analysis; http://string-db.org) to identify PPI pairs of differentially expressed genes  in both the AAA group and the control group We analyzed protein interactions via the STRING datasets with a confidence threshold of 0. 40, and then cleansed and arranged the data with igraph[1. 4. 1] in R (4. 2. 1). The PPI network was formulated using Cytoscape software, with the subsequent application of the cytoHubba module to pinpoint the top 10 genes.

为了构建蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用网络（Protein-Protein Interaction, PPI），我们使用了Cytoscape软件（http://cytoscape.org/）。在该网络中，每个蛋白质由一个节点表示，其与其他蛋白质的相互作用由边缘线表示。我们利用STRING数据库（蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用网络的功能富集分析；http://string-db.org）来识别腹主动脉瘤组和对照组中差异表达基因的PPI配对。我们使用STRING数据库以0.40的置信度阈值分析蛋白质相互作用，然后使用R中的igraph包[1.4.1]（版本4.2.1）清洗和整理数据。使用Cytoscape软件构建PPI网络，并使用cytoHubba模块进一步筛选出前10个关键基因。
翻译为中文论文语言Assessment of AAA-related single-cell gene expression profiles in the HPA datasets
评估HPA（人类蛋白质图谱）数据库中与AAA（腹主动脉瘤）相关单细胞基因表达谱

翻译为中文论文语言The Human Protein Atlas datasets, otherwise referred to as the HPA datasets, catalogues human protein details in cells, tissues, and organs, utilizing proteomics, transcriptomics, and systems biology data. It provides information on the expression of each protein in 64 different cell lines, as well as 48 different types of normal human tissues, and twenty types of tumour tissues[14, 15]. The HPA datasets is a sample datasets that includes protein expression information of normal tissues, tumour tissues, and cells, as well as survival curves of cancer patients[16]. We will select genes SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2 and FOS to perform single-cell analysis by inputting them into the HPA datasets, and discovered that a notable difference was observed in their expression levels.

人类蛋白质图谱（Human Protein Atlas，简称HPA）数据库利用蛋白质组学、转录组学和系统生物学数据，收录了人类在细胞、组织和器官中的蛋白质信息。该数据库提供了每种蛋白质在64种不同细胞系、48种不同的正常人体组织以及20种肿瘤组织中的表达数据[14, 15]。HPA数据库是一个样本数据库，包含了正常组织、肿瘤组织和细胞的蛋白表达信息，以及癌症患者的生存曲线[16]。我们将选择基因SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS，通过将它们输入HPA数据库来进行单细胞分析，并发现它们的表达水平存在显著差异。
Analytical Statistics
统计分析

Findings were presented as the mean ± standard error of the mean. The Student's t-test was used to determine the statistical significance of differences between two groups. The predictive ability of central genes for AAA was evaluated using receiver operating characteristic curves. It was considered significant if the p-value was less than 0.05.
研究结果以平均值 ± 标准误表示。使用学生t检验来确定两组之间差异的统计学意义。通过接收者操作特征曲线评估核心基因对腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的预测能力。如果p值小于0.05，则认为具有统计学上的显著性。

翻译为中文论文语言Outcomes
Fig.1 depicts the workflow for the current study. Analyzing the GSE47472, GSE57691, and GSE119717 datasets (Table 1), we identified 819, 237, and 24 differentially expressed genes, via the criteria p<0. 05 and |log2Fold change (logFC)| >1. We will once again normalize the data via the function of normalize Between Arrays within the package of limma, examine the sample conditions using box plots, conduct differential assessment of the two groups via the limma package, visualize the differential assessment outcomes via a volcano plot using ggplot2 [3. 3. 6] in R, and visualize the significantly expressed molecules in a heatmap format using Heatmap [2. 13. 1] in R. (Figures 2,3, and 4).

结果

图1展示了当前研究的工作流程。分析GSE47472、GSE57691和GSE119717数据集（表1），我们根据p<0.05和|log2倍数变化（logFC）| >1的标准，识别出了819、237和24个差异表达基因。我们将再次使用limma包中的normalizeBetweenArrays函数对数据进行标准化，利用箱型图检查样品情况，通过limma包进行两组的差异评估，使用R中的ggplot2 [3.3.6]通过火山图可视化差异评估结果，并使用R中的Heatmap [2.13.1]以热图格式可视化显著表达的分子。（图2、图3和图4）。
翻译为中文论文语言Functional and Pathway Enrichment Examination of Genes with Differential Expression
差异表达基因的功能与途径富集分析

翻译为中文论文语言The genes with differential expression were merged from GSE47472 as well as GSE57691, and analyzed mRNA functions of 1056 genes with differential expression via the cluster Profiler [4. 4. 4] R package to identify GO and KEGG pathways.
来自GSE47472和GSE57691的差异表达基因进行了合并，并通过clusterProfiler [4.4.4] R包分析了1056个差异表达基因的mRNA功能，以识别GO（基因本体）和KEGG（京都基因和基因组百科全书）途径。

翻译为中文论文语言The biological process groups pertaino responses to external stimuli, upregulation of defensive responses, governance of nitric oxide metabolic processes, and enhancement of acute inflammatory response. The cell component groups incorporated ficolin-1-rich granule membrane, haptoglobin-hemoglobin complex, and transverse plasma membrane constituents. The molecular functions in AAA primarily involved heme binding, cytokine binding, and oxygen carrier operation. The Kyoto Genomic Encyclopedia has provided insight, indicating that genes expressing elevated activity are primarily involved in various conditions and reactions, including human cytomegalovirus infections, signals from chemokines, non-alcoholic steatohepatitis, and the IL-17 signal pathway (Figure 5A). The concentrated review of the 601 lower-active differentially expressed genes (Table 3) accentuated that the leading three features in cellular structures include the respirasome, mitochondrial respirasome, cytochrome complex, and the complex IV of the mitochondrial respiratory chain. The molecular functions in AAA predominantly centered around activation of active transmembrane transporters induced by oxidoreduction, oxidoreductase activity on the heme group of donors, and cytochrome-c oxidase operation. The KEGG pathway findings of downregulated DEGs indicated involvement primarily in thermogenesis, oxidative phosphorylation, cardiac muscle contraction, and fatty acid degradation (Figure 5B). The DEGs in the GSE119717 dataset were scrutinized, leading to the identification of 24 upregulated genes through GO and KEGG pathway analysis conducted via the clusterProfiler [4.4.4] package in R (Table 4). The biological processes encompassed cell chemotaxis, response to bacterial-origin molecules, granulocyte chemotaxis, and neutrophil chemotaxis. Cellular structures also include components such as the collagen-rich extracellular matrix, endoplasmic reticulum interior, and membrane-attached elements. AAA's molecular functions mainly focus on specific DNA-binding transcription activator activity associated with RNA polymerase II, extracellular matrix constituents, and G protein-linked receptor binding. The KEGG pathway findings for upregulated DEGs signified mRNA primarily participating in the PI3K-Akt signaling pathway, IL-17 signaling pathway, TNF signaling pathway, and interactions of viral proteins with cytokines and cytokine receptors.(Figure 6A)

差异表达基因涉及的生物过程包括对外界刺激的反应、防御反应的上调、一氧化氮代谢过程的调控以及急性炎症反应的增强。细胞成分组中包括富含ficolin-1的颗粒膜、血红蛋白-血红素复合体和横切质膜成分。腹主动脉瘤（AAA）中的分子功能主要涉及血红素结合、细胞因子结合和氧携带分子的活动。京都基因组百科全书（KEGG）的见解表明，表达活性增高的基因主要参与诸如人类巨细胞病毒感染、趋化因子信号、非酒精性脂肪肝炎以及IL-17信号途径等多种疾病和反应（图5A）。对601个活性较低的差异表达基因（表3）的深入分析强调，在细胞结构方面的前三项特征包括呼吸体、线粒体呼吸体、细胞色素复合体和线粒体呼吸链的复合体IV。AAA中的分子功能主要集中在活性跨膜转运蛋白的氧化还原诱导激活、作用于供体血红素组上的氧化还原酶活性以及细胞色素c氧化酶的活动。KEGG途径发现下调差异表达基因主要参与热发生、氧化磷酸化、心肌收缩和脂肪酸降解（图5B）。GSE119717数据集中的差异表达基因进行了审查，通过R中clusterProfiler [4.4.4]包进行的GO和KEGG途径分析，鉴定出24个上调基因（表4）。生物过程涵盖细胞趋化性、对细菌源分子的反应、粒细胞趋化性以及嗜中性粒细胞趋化性。细胞结构还包括诸如富含胶原的细胞外基质、内质网内部和膜附着元素等成分。AAA的分子功能主要集中在特定DNA结合转录激活因子活性、与RNA聚合酶II有关的细胞外基质成分以及G蛋白偶联受体结合。上调差异表达基因的KEGG途径结果表明，mRNA主要参与PI3K-Akt信号途径、IL-17信号途径、TNF信号途径以及病毒蛋白与细胞因子及细胞因子受体的相互作用（图6A）。

翻译为中文论文语言Gene Set Enrichment Analysis
GO is used to identify functional alterations caused by differential gene expression, whereas KEGG is used to identify pathway-level alterations. Enrichment assessment of differential genes in GO and KEGG requires defined thresholds, which may exclude biologically significant genes. GSEA does not require explicit differential gene thresholds and analyzes based on actual global trends; therefore, its results can complement the enrichment assessment of GO and KEGG. In the difference classification diagram, the top five upregulated and downregulated genes were marked. (Figure 6D) We performed GSEA enrichment analysis and visualization (Figure 6C) using ggplot2 [3.3.6] and R's clusterProfiler [4.4.4] for selected genes with differential expression in the dataset. The identification of differences was based on the following criteria: p. adj below 0.05 and FDR(q-value) below 0.25. Because of the limited differentially expressed transcripts in GSE119717, GSEA enrichment analysis is not performed.

基因集富集分析

基因本体（GO）用于识别由差异基因表达引起的功能性变化，而京都基因与基因组百科全书（KEGG）用于识别途径级别的变化。在GO和KEGG中进行差异基因的富集评估需要定义阈值，这可能会排除生物学上重要的基因。基因集富集分析（GSEA）不需要明确的差异基因阈值，并基于实际的全局趋势进行分析；因此，其结果可以补充GO和KEGG的富集评估。在差异分类图中，标记了排名前五的上调和下调基因。（图6D）我们使用ggplot2[3.3.6]和R的clusterProfiler[4.4.4]对数据集中选定的差异表达基因进行GSEA富集分析和可视化（图6C）。差异的识别基于以下标准：p.adj低于0.05且FDR（q值）低于0.25。由于GSE119717中差异表达转录本有限，因此未进行GSEA富集分析。

翻译为中文论文语言Constructing a network of protein-protein interactions (PPI) and analyzing key genes
STRING, an online repository and tool for forecasting and substantiating protein-protein interplay as a biological datasets received all DEGs. After constructing PPI networks via the parameters of experiments, neighbourhood, datasets, text mining, and co-expression in Cytoscape software, isolated genes were eliminated. Figure 7A depicts the interactions between genes with differential expression from the merged GSE47472 and GSE57691 datasets, while Figure 7B depicts the interactions between genes with differential expression from the GSE119717 dataset. c: CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, EGR1, FOS, ATF3, DUSP1, JUN, MY (Figure 7C); CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, FOS, OSM, IL1B, S100A8, HCK, NCF2 (Figure 7D). All of these essential genes may have clinical relevance.

构建蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用（PPI）网络和分析关键基因

STRING，一个在线存储库和工具，用于预测和证实蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用作为生物数据集，接纳了所有的差异表达基因（DEGs）。通过Cytoscape软件中实验、邻域、数据集、文本挖掘和共表达的参数构建PPI网络后，孤立的基因被消除。图7A显示了合并的GSE47472和GSE57691数据集中具有差异表达的基因之间的相互作用，图7B显示了GSE119717数据集中具有差异表达的基因之间的相互作用。c: CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, EGR1, FOS, ATF3, DUSP1, JUN, MY（图7C）；CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, FOS, OSM, IL1B, S100A8, HCK, NCF2（图7D）。所有这些关键基因都可能具有临床相关性。
Clinical Significance of Hub Genes for Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm
腹主动脉瘤中心基因的临床意义

The relationship between sensitivity and specificity is represented by the ROC curve. Figure 8 depicts a ROC curve indicating that the diagnostic sensitivity of 4 hub genes for AAA is outstanding. Among them, the AUC of FOS is 0. 963, indicating that this gene may be a potential biomarker for diagnosing AAA because it predicts the outcome more accurately. It is essential to note, however, that the ROC curve is merely an instrument for evaluating the predictive performance of a model and cannot prove that a particular gene is a biomarker for AAA. Therefore, additional experimental validation, such as large clinical trials, replication studies at multiple research centres, etc. , is required to ascertain the true diagnostic value of this gene in AAA.

敏感性与特异性的关系由ROC曲线表示。图8展示了一个ROC曲线，表明4个中心基因对腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的诊断敏感性出色。其中，FOS的AUC为0.963，表明这个基因可能是诊断AAA的潜在生物标记物，因为它可以更准确地预测结果。然而，必须指出的是，ROC曲线仅仅是一个评估模型预测性能的工具，并不能证明某个特定基因就是AAA的生物标记物。因此，需要额外的实验验证，如大型临床试验、多个研究中心的复制研究等，才能确定这个基因在AAA中的真正诊断价值。

翻译为中文论文语言Clinical Significance of Hub Genes for Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm
The relationship between sensitivity and specificity is represented by the ROC curve. Figure 8 depicts a ROC curve indicating that the diagnostic sensitivity of 4 hub genes for AAA is outstanding. Among them, the AUC of FOS is 0. 963, indicating that this gene may be a potential biomarker for diagnosing AAA because it predicts the outcome more accurately. It is essential to note, however, that the ROC curve is merely an instrument for evaluating the predictive performance of a model and cannot prove that a particular gene is a biomarker for AAA. Therefore, additional experimental validation, such as large clinical trials, replication studies at multiple research centres, etc. , is required to ascertain the true diagnostic value of this gene in AAA.

腹主动脉瘤中心基因的临床意义
敏感性与特异性的关系由ROC曲线表示。图8展示了一个ROC曲线，表明4个中心基因对腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的诊断敏感性出色。其中，FOS的AUC值为0.963，表明这一基因可能成为诊断AAA的潜在生物标记物，因为它可以更精确地预测疾病结果。然而，必须注意的是，ROC曲线仅是一个评估模型预测性能的工具，并不能证实某一特定基因就是AAA的生物标记物。因此，还需要进行更多的实验验证，比如大规模的临床试验、多个研究中心的复制研究等，才能确定该基因在AAA中的真正诊断价值。

翻译为中文论文语言Identification of Key Genes in AAA Using Single-Cell HPA datasets Analysis
Initiated in 2003, The Human Protein Atlas (visit www.proteinatlas.org), a project originating from Sweden, has a mission to map all human proteins within cells, tissues, and organs. This is achieved by employing a unified approach of omics technologies, which includes imaging facilitated by antibodies, proteomics guided by mass spectrometry, transcriptomics, and systems biology. Using single-cell analysis from the HPA datasets, it was discovered that cells from AAA exhibit elevated levels of SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS (Figure 9). assessment of the FOS gene in the single-cell assessment of the HPA datasets revealed that it is expressed in a variety of tissue types with varying expression levels; it is lower in lymphocytes and adipocytes and relatively greater in muscle and endothelial cells. Negatively regulating cytokine signalling pathways and inflammatory responses is a function of the SOCS3 gene. The SOCS3 gene is specifically highly expressed in inflammatory tissues. IL6 is a cytokine that regulates cell proliferation, differentiation, apoptosis, immune cell activation and proliferation, and primarily mediates inter-cellular signalling responses during inflammation and immune responses. Due to the impact of inflammatory responses on the development of AAA, elevated levels of IL6 could be a contributing factor to the development of the disease and the inflammatory process. PTGS2 is an important inflammatory factor that mediates physiological processes including inflammation and pain perception and participates in essential biological processes such as proliferation of cells, migration, as well as apoptosis. Through analyzing single-cell RNA sequencing data from AAA via the HPA datasets, it is possible to identify essential genes for the disease, thereby providing crucial scientific evidence for disease prevention, diagnosis, and treatment.

通过人类蛋白质图谱单细胞数据集分析识别腹主动脉瘤关键基因
人类蛋白质图谱（Human Protein Atlas，访问www.proteinatlas.org）项目始于2003年，源自瑞典，其使命是利用统一的组学技术方法绘制出存在于细胞、组织和器官中的所有人类蛋白质。这一目标通过结合抗体促进的成像技术、质谱引导的蛋白质组学、转录组学和系统生物学实现。使用人类蛋白质图谱数据库中的单细胞分析，发现腹主动脉瘤（AAA）患者的细胞中SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS的水平升高（图9）。在人类蛋白质图谱单细胞分析中对FOS基因的评估发现，它在多种组织类型中表达，表达水平不同；在淋巴细胞和脂肪细胞中较低，在肌肉细胞和内皮细胞中相对较高。SOCS3基因的功能是负向调节细胞因子信号通路和炎症反应。SOCS3基因在炎症组织中特别高表达。IL6是一种细胞因子，调节细胞增殖、分化、凋亡、免疫细胞激活和增殖，主要在炎症和免疫反应期间介导细胞间的信号应答。由于炎症反应对AAA的发展有影响，IL6的水平升高可能是促进疾病发展和炎症过程的一个因素。PTGS2 是一个重要的炎症因子，介导包括炎症和痛觉在内的生理过程，参与细胞增殖、迁移和凋亡等基本生物学过程。通过分析人类蛋白质图谱数据库中AAA的单细胞RNA测序数据，可以识别出疾病的关键基因，为疾病的预防、诊断和治疗提供重要的科学证据。

翻译为中文论文语言Discussion
AAA is a medical term denoting a condition where there is an enduring expansion of the abdominal aorta beyond 3 centimeters in diameter. The majority of AAA instances are found in the segment below the kidneys, known as the infrarenal section of the abdominal aorta. [17]. The majority of AAAs are asymptomatic prior to catastrophic rupture. This study used bioinformatics to extract, classify, and screen the gene expression information on human AAA genes within the Gene Expression Omnibus datasets. The diameter of the AAA is the strongest predictor of rupture. Bioinformatics was used to investigate putative genes with differential expression between samples of aortic wall from healthy individuals (controls) and patients with AAA. Gene enrichment analysis was then used to assess biological relevance. SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS were identified as key DEGs implicated in the pathogenesis or treatment of AAA. These three DEGs could act as vital biomarkers, providing mechanistic insights into AAA's pathogenesis and progression.

讨论
腹主动脉瘤（AAA）是一种医学术语，指的是腹主动脉持续性扩张超过3厘米直径的情况。大多数AAA病例发现在肾下段，即腹主动脉的肾下部分[17]。大多数AAA在灾难性破裂之前无任何症状。本研究利用生物信息学方法从基因表达综合数据库中提取、分类和筛选有关人类AAA基因的表达信息。AAA的直径是破裂的最强预测因素。利用生物信息学研究健康个体（对照组）与AAA患者的主动脉壁样本之间差异表达的潜在基因。然后利用基因富集分析评估生物学相关性。SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS被识别为与AAA的发病或治疗相关的关键差异表达基因（DEGs）。这三个DEGs可能作为重要的生物标记物，为AAA的发病机制和进展提供机理见解。

翻译为中文论文语言Currently, the progression of AAA has been attributed to inflammation, oxidative strain, apoptosis of smooth muscle cells, and the breakdown of the extracellular matrix[19]. The Gene Ontology and Kyoto Genomic Encyclopedia's assessment of this study's increasingly active differentially expressed genes primarily connect to the inflammatory response, indicating the criticality of immune and inflammatory processes in AAA's evolution. Vascular damage, frequently linked with inflammation in most cardiovascular diseases, can cause endothelial cell death and vessel wall structure disruption[20]. Patients experiencing AAA rupture showed heightened gene activity relating to inflammation, proteolysis, regulation of vascular smooth muscle cell lineages, and extracellular matrix homeostasis pathways. Alongside the activation of immune responses, the AAA wall experiences proteolytic extracellular matrix fragmentation and VSMC phenotypic modulation or apoptosis, leading to significant medial thinning and degradation, reduced VSMC numbers, and fewer elastic elements in the aneurysm wall[21, 22].

目前，AAA的进展被认为与炎症、氧化应激、平滑肌细胞的凋亡以及细胞外基质的降解有关[19]。本研究中，活性不断增强的差异表达基因的基因本体（Gene Ontology）和京都基因组百科全书（Kyoto Genomic Encyclopedia）评估主要与炎症反应相关，说明免疫和炎症过程在AAA发展中的关键性。血管损伤经常与大多数心血管疾病中的炎症相关，可以导致内皮细胞死亡和血管壁结构破坏[20]。经历AAA破裂的患者表现出与炎症、蛋白水解、血管平滑肌细胞系的调控和细胞外基质稳态途径相关的基因活动增高。随着免疫反应的激活，AAA壁体验到蛋白水解性细胞外基质的破碎以及平滑肌细胞（VSMC）表型的改变或凋亡，导致显著的中层变薄和降解，VSMC数量减少，以及在动脉瘤壁中弹性元素的减少[21, 22]。

翻译为中文论文语言assessment of genes with differential expression from GSE47472, GSE57691, and GSE119717 datasets led to the identification of 479 upregulated and 601 downregulated genes. Pathway enrichment analysis was carried out via these DEGs. Top five enriched GO terms included the ability to regulate responses to external stimuli in a positive manner, defense response, nitric oxide metabolic process, acute inflammatory response, and extracellular matrix structural component. TNF signalling pathway, human cytomegalovirus infection, Chemokine signalling pathway, non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, and IL-17 signalling pathway were the five most enriched KEGG pathways. CXCL8, SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS have been identified as important DEGs in AAA formation. The expression levels of these genes, which include SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS, were higher in arterial aneurysm cells, as determined by a single-cell assessment of the HPA datasets. To evaluate the role and clinical application potential of the screened genes in various diseases, it is necessary to consider additional experimental data and clinical pathological information. We will continue to investigate this in future studies. Alzheimer's disease is associated with multiple genetic and environmental factors, with the FOS gene identified as a key genetic contributor. As a gene transcription factor, It is essential for the proliferation, differentiation, transformation, and apoptosis of cells that FOS plays a critical role. According to recent studies, a key role is played by FOS in the development of AAA[25]

通过分析GSE47472、GSE57691和GSE119717数据集中的差异表达基因，确定了479个上调和601个下调基因。这些差异表达基因（DEGs）进行了途径富集分析。前五个富集的GO术语包括积极调节对外界刺激的反应、防御反应、一氧化氮代谢过程、急性炎症反应和细胞外基质结构成分。TNF信号通路、人类巨细胞病毒感染、趋化因子信号通路、非酒精性脂肪肝病和IL-17信号通路是五个最富集的KEGG途径。CXCL8、SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS被认为是AAA形成中的重要差异表达基因。通过人类蛋白质图谱（HPA）数据集的单细胞评估确定，这些基因包括SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS在动脉瘤细胞中的表达水平较高。为评估筛选基因在不同疾病中的作用和临床应用潜力，需要考虑更多实验数据和临床病理信息。我们将在未来的研究中继续调查这一点。阿尔茨海默病与多种遗传和环境因素有关，FOS基因被认为是关键的遗传贡献因子。作为一个基因转录因子，FOS在细胞的增殖、分化、转化和凋亡中发挥关键作用。根据近期研究，FOS在AAA的发展中起着关键作用[25]。

翻译为中文论文语言The findings of these studies suggest that increased expression of the FOS gene contributes to the development of AAA by increasing inflammatory response. Moreover, FOS gene expression is also associated with aortic wall destruction and intratumoral angiogenesis, providing additional evidence for its role in the development of AAA. Given its promoting effect, the FOS gene may offer new potential treatment approaches and targets for AAA[26]. How the FOS gene contributes to the development of AAA remains unknown. However, ongoing research attempts to identify genetic pathways and processes associated with the FOS gene. For instance, a prospective study found that the FOS gene is significantly associated with the oxidative stress pathway in the development of AAA. [28] Overall, the FOS gene is a crucial contributor to the development of AAA. [27] Such research results provide a crucial launching point for further investigation into the FOS gene's role and mechanisms in AAA. While the precise effect and mechanism of the FOS gene in AAA remain unknown, continued exploration of genes and pathways related to FOS may yield novel preventive and therapeutic strategies for AAA. In AAA initiation and progression, monocytes within the abdominal aorta's adventitia secrete IL6 in response to stimulation by fibroblasts. This release promotes their differentiation into macrophages and exacerbates macrophage activation[29]. Pathogenic macrophages are transformed by phage cells, and signal transduction is mediated by IL-6 to exacerbate the inflammatory response by binding to different cell types' receptors, amplifying its overall impact[30, 31]. Such processes include B and T cell signalling pathways, interactions between cytokines and their receptors, and the cytotoxicity mediated by NK cells, among others[32-34]. The SOCS3 gene function within the occurrence as well as progression of various diseases extends beyond negatively modulating cell signalling pathways. Recent research has demonstrated its central role in abdominal aortic aneurysms (AAA) [35]

这些研究结果表明，FOS基因表达的增加通过增强炎症反应，促进了腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的发展。此外，FOS基因表达也与主动脉壁的破坏和肿瘤内血管生成有关，为其在AAA发展中的作用提供了额外的证据。考虑到其促进作用，FOS基因可能为AAA的治疗提供了新的潜在方法和靶点[26]。FOS基因如何促进AAA的发展尚不清楚。然而，正在进行的研究试图确定与FOS基因相关的遗传途径和过程。例如，一项前瞻性研究发现FOS基因与AAA发展中的氧化应激途径有显著关联[28]。总体而言，FOS基因是AAA发展的关键因素[27]。这些研究结果为进一步探讨FOS基因在AAA中的作用和机制提供了关键的起点。尽管FOS基因在AAA中的确切作用和机制尚不清楚，但继续探索与FOS相关的基因和途径可能会为AAA的预防和治疗提供新的策略。在AAA的发起和进展中，腹主动脉外膜中的单核细胞在成纤维细胞的刺激下分泌IL6。这种释放促进了它们向巨噬细胞的分化并加剧了巨噬细胞的激活[29]。噬菌体细胞转化为致病性巨噬细胞，并通过IL-6介导的信号传导，通过与不同细胞类型的受体结合来加剧炎症反应，放大了其总体影响[30, 31]。这些过程包括B细胞和T细胞信号通路、细胞因子及其受体之间的相互作用，以及NK细胞介导的细胞毒性等[32-34]。SOCS3基因在多种疾病的发生和进展中的功能不仅仅是负向调节细胞信号通路。最近的研究已经展示了它在腹主动脉瘤（AAA）中的核心作用[35]。

翻译为中文论文语言The SOCS3 gene influences the development of AAA by negatively modulating the JAK/STAT signalling pathway, which modulates inflammation and apoptosis. The expression of the SOCS3 gene is substantially decreased in patients with AAA, and its expression level is significantly negatively correlated with the diameter of AAA [36]. Based on these findings, it appears that the SOCS3 gene is involved in the onset and progression of AAA., playing a crucial role in the inflammation and apoptosis pathways. Manipulating the expression levels of SOCS3 gene may offer a promising approach to manage and treat this condition[37]. Additionally, some studies have found that long-term inflammation can lead to DNA methylation of the SOCS3 gene, resulting in its downregulation[38]. Future studies can explore the regulatory mechanisms of the SOCS3 gene to further determine its role in AAA. Recent research underscores FOS's significance in AAA development.

SOCS3基因通过负向调节JAK/STAT信号通路影响AAA的发展，该通路调控炎症和凋亡。在AAA患者中，SOCS3基因的表达显著下降，且其表达水平与AAA的直径显著负相关[36]。基于这些发现，显然SOCS3基因参与了AAA的发病和进展，且在炎症和凋亡途径中发挥了关键作用。操纵SOCS3基因的表达水平可能是管理和治疗该疾病的有前景的方法[37]。此外，一些研究发现，长期的炎症可以导致SOCS3基因的DNA甲基化，从而引起基因的下调[38]。未来的研究可以探索SOCS3基因的调节机制，以进一步确定其在AAA中的作用。近期的研究强调了FOS在AAA发展中的重要性。

翻译为中文论文语言To conclude, the SOCS3 gene is instrumental in regulating the pathogenesis of AAA, making it a potential therapeutic target for managing and controlling AAA's evolution. Nonetheless, comprehensive understanding of its underlying mechanisms necessitates further exploration. Our study underscores the PTGS2 gene as being fundamental in AAA's inception and progression. Notably, PTGS2 gene expression levels in AAA patients showed a significant elevation, positively correlating with AAA size. Furthermore, PTGS2 gene's activity and expression levels demonstrated a strong association with AAA's inflammatory response and apoptotic process. Corresponding with prior research[39, 40], these insights emphasize the PTGS2 gene's central role in AAA pathogenesis. COX-2, an enzyme encoded by the PTGS2 gene, is pivotal in the biosynthesis of prostaglandins—biologically active compounds involved in diverse physiological and pathological processes. While the exact function of COX-2 remains to be clarified, it's established as a player in numerous processes, including inflammation, cell apoptosis, and tumour development[41]. Our observations suggest PTGS2 gene's importance in modulating AAA's inflammatory response and apoptosis, thereby underscoring its promise as a viable therapeutic target for AAA's prevention and management. 
There are some limitations to our study. This study managed to determine the expression intensity of DEGs in AAA, yet it didn't delve into the detailed mechanics of these potential genes within animal models or AAA cells. It is essential to conduct additional studies to explore these mechanisms further.

总结而言，SOCS3基因在调控腹主动脉瘤（AAA）的发病机制中起着关键作用，因此它是管理和控制AAA发展的潜在治疗目标。尽管如此，对其潜在机制的全面理解还需要进一步的探索。我们的研究强调了PTGS2基因在AAA的发起和进展中的基础性作用。特别值得注意的是，AAA患者中PTGS2基因的表达水平显著上升，并与AAA的大小正相关。此外，PTGS2基因的活性和表达水平与AAA的炎症反应和凋亡过程有着密切的关联。与先前的研究[39, 40]相符，这些洞见强调了PTGS2基因在AAA的发病机制中的核心角色。由PTGS2基因编码的COX-2酶在前列腺素的生物合成中具有重要作用——前列腺素是参与各种生理和病理过程的生物活性化合物。虽然COX-2的确切功能尚需明确，但它已被确定为许多过程的参与者，包括炎症、细胞凋亡和肿瘤发展[41]。我们的观察结果表明，PTGS2基因在调节AAA的炎症反应和凋亡方面的重要性，从而强调了它作为AAA预防和管理的可行治疗目标的前景。

我们的研究存在一些局限性。这项研究确定了DEGs在AAA中的表达强度，但没有深入探讨这些潜在基因在动物模型或AAA细胞中的具体机制。进行额外的研究以进一步探索这些机制是必要的。

翻译为中文论文语言To recap, our bioinformatics analysis identified 15 potential genes, including SOCS3, IL6, PTGS2, and FOS, likely implicated in AAA's pathogenesis and development. These insights enhance our understanding of AAA, providing therapeutic guidance.
总结而言，我们的生物信息学分析识别出15个潜在基因，包括SOCS3、IL6、PTGS2和FOS，这些基因可能与AAA的发病机制和发展有关。这些洞见增强了我们对AAA的理解，并提供了治疗指导。
论文中的作者用英文怎么表述

作者在论文中的英文表述通常为 "author" 或 "the authors"，具体情况取决于作者数量。如果需要更明确的表达，可以用以下几种方式：

1. 单一作者时，可以表示为 "the author"。
2. 多个作者时，可以表示为 "the authors"。
3. 如果指代特定的作者（例如，论文的第一作者或通讯作者），可以表达为 "the corresponding author" 或 "the first author"。

在提到论文作者的贡献或声明时，常用表述如下：
- "According to the authors, ..."
- "The authors suggest that ..."
- "The authors of the study highlight ..."
- "In their paper/research/article, the authors ..."

在提到具体的作者姓名时，可以直接列出，例如：
- "Smith et al. (year) reported that ..."
- "Johnson, in his 2020 study, found that ..."

具体用法取决于论文的写作风格和出版机构的格式要求。在学术写作中，常用APA、MLA、Chicago等标准格式来引用和提及作者。
翻译：关键词：生物信息学分析；腹主动脉瘤；关键基因；信号通路；诊断生物标志物；蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。
关键词：生物信息学分析；腹主动脉瘤；关键基因；信号途径；诊断生物标志物；蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用。
Details of the datasets used in this study
本研究使用的数据集详情
The BP,CC, MF and KEGG enriched analysis of upregulated DEG between AAA and control
上调差异表达基因（DEG）在AAA与对照组间的BP、CC、MF和KEGG富集分析
Table3 The BP,CC, MF and KEGG enriched analysis of downregulated DEG between AAA and control
表3：腹主动脉瘤（AAA）与对照组间下调差异表达基因（DEG）的BP、CC、MF和KEGG富集分析
Table4 The BP,CC, MF and KEGG enriched analysis of upregulated DEG between AAA and control
表4：腹主动脉瘤（AAA）与对照组间上调差异表达基因（DEG）的BP、CC、MF和KEGG富集分析

翻译We merged the differentially expressed genes from GSE47472 and GSE57691, and analyzed the mRNA functions of 1056 differentially expressed genes using the cluster Profiler [4.4.4] package in R to identify GO and KEGG pathways. Enrichment analyses of the 455 upregulated DEGs (Table 2) showed that the top four terms in BPs included regulation of positive regulation of response
to external stimulus, positive regulation of defense response, regulation of nitric oxide metabolic process and positive regulation of acute inflammatory response. The CC groups were ficolin−1−rich granule membrane, haptoglobin−hemoglobin complex and spanning component of plasma membrane. The MFs in AAA mainly focused on heme binding, cytokine binding and oxygen carrier activity. The KEGG pathway findings of the upregulated DEGs revealed that mRNA was mainly involved in the human cytomegalovirus infection, Chemokine signaling pathway,non−alcoholic fatty liver disease and IL−17 signaling pathway.(Figure 5A) Enrichment analyses of the 601 downregulated DEGs (Table 3) showed that the top three terms in CC groups were respirasome, mitochondrial respirasome,cytochromecomplex and mitochondrial respiratory chain complex IV.

我们合并了来自GSE47472和GSE57691的差异表达基因，并使用R中的clusterProfiler[4.4.4]包分析了1056个差异表达基因的mRNA功能，以识别GO和KEGG途径。对455个上调差异表达基因（DEG）的富集分析（表2）显示，在生物过程（BPs）分类中，排名前四的术语包括对外部刺激反应的积极调节、防御反应的积极调节、一氧化氮代谢过程的调节以及急性炎症反应的积极调节。细胞组分（CC）组包括富含ficolin−1的颗粒膜、血红蛋白-血红素复合物和质膜横跨成分。在AAA中，分子功能（MFs）主要侧重于血红素结合、细胞因子结合和氧运载活性。上调差异表达基因的KEGG途径结果显示，mRNA主要涉及人类巨细胞病毒感染、趋化因子信号途径、非酒精性脂肪肝病和IL-17信号途径（图5A）。对601个下调差异表达基因的富集分析（表3）显示，在细胞组分（CC）组中排名前三的术语是呼吸体、线粒体呼吸体、细胞色素复合体和线粒体呼吸链复合体IV。
